hero.title: Interview Scheduler
hero.description: Organize interview appointments, rounds, and calendar reminders.

differences.title: Keep every interview stage connected
differences.description: Interview Scheduler provides a focused workflow for planning interviews, tracking rounds, and keeping event timing visible.

items.title: Schedule foundation
items.description: Capture candidate, role, company, stage, priority, and target date.

items.title: Round planning
items.description: Track each interview round with interviewer, type, timing, and preparation notes.

items.title: Calendar planning
items.description: Keep interview events and reminders attached to the schedule.

feel.title: A calm interview planning desk
feel.description: The workflow keeps interview context and upcoming events in one place.

items.title: Create the schedule
items.description: Start with the candidate, role, stage, and target timeline.

items.title: Add rounds
items.description: Plan the next interview steps and preparation notes.

items.title: Place events
items.description: Track timing, reminders, and locations on the calendar.

audiences.title: Who uses Interview Scheduler
audiences.description: Useful for people and teams organizing interview appointments.

items.description: Keep upcoming interviews and follow-ups organized.

items.title: Recruiters
items.description: Track candidate rounds and scheduling details.

items.title: Hiring teams
items.description: Review planned interview appointments and timing.
